name: adults-pin-gate
description: Per-user 4-digit PIN that gates 18+ areas. Stored as a bcrypt hash on the users table. Single-component wrapper — drop <AdultsPinGate> around any page.
postInstall: 1. Run the DB migration (adds adults_pin_hash to users)
3. The component prompts for a 4-digit PIN; first entry sets it, subsequent entries verify
4. Session-scoped unlock (sessionStorage), so closing the tab re-locks
